MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Vikram Devadhara dba Royal Inn.& K. Miranda is present.
Defendant Anthony Wayne Cook, John Holland is present.
Attorney Samuel L. Pooler representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-02-2012 is vacated. (501/REQ)
